title: submission checklist
body:
# Submission Checklist (Assessment 2)

## Required Deliverables
- [ ] Report PDF (<= 2,500 words)
- [ ] Code file(s) used for analysis
- [ ] Clean dataset(s) used in report
- [ ] Peer evaluation submitted by each member
- [ ] AI usage documented and justified

## Internal QA
- [ ] Out-of-time split verified (no leakage)
- [ ] Top-k selection reproducible
- [ ] Baselines generated for all valid pairs
- [ ] Figures match reported metrics
- [ ] Report references output tables/figures consistently
- [ ] Team reviewed assumptions and limitations

## Final Packaging
- [ ] `/output/data` attached (or required subset)
- [ ] `/output/figures` attached
- [ ] `/output/report/assessment2_report_draft.md` converted to final PDF
- [ ] Similarity check reviewed before final Moodle upload
